uplink.description: T1_MECA_1MN frame: cumulative energy index + 20 per-minute power samples (most recent 1500 W)
uplink._note: Synthetic T1_MECA_1MN frame (header 0x5b, 45 bytes): 4-byte big-endian index then 20 uint16 per-minute powers. expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (oracle: index 100000, powers[19] 1500). index Wh -> metering.energy.total; most-recent non-null power -> power.active; full series kept as the powers extra. Satisfies power-meter.
find_message_type returns null for an unknown header/size combination.
